tips.title: Shift to off-peak
tips.description: Run your appliances during off-peak hours to take advantage of lower rates. Most utilities charge less between 10pm and 6am.

tips.title: Optimise cooling
tips.description: Set your air conditioner to 24-26°C. Each degree cooler adds about 10% to your cooling costs.

tips.title: Switch to LED lighting
tips.description: LED bulbs use up to 80% less energy than traditional bulbs and last up to 25 times longer.

tips.title: Use a 5-star rated appliance
tips.description: When buying new appliances, choose BEE 5-star rated products to minimise electricity consumption.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Join the thousands of households making smarter energy choices.

items.name: Priya K.
items.quote: Switching was incredibly easy. I'm saving around 15% compared to my old provider, and the solar option has been a game changer.

items.name: Arjun S.
items.quote: The app is brilliant. I can see exactly when I'm using the most energy and shift things to off-peak. My bills have dropped noticeably.

items.name: Meena R.
items.quote: The solar and battery bundle was exactly what we needed. We hardly notice the power cuts anymore thanks to the battery backup.

items.title: Lower electricity bills
items.description: Generate your own power during the day and reduce what you draw from the grid.

items.title: Net metering credits
items.description: Export excess solar energy to the grid and receive a credit on your electricity bill under state net metering policies.

items.title: Reduce your carbon footprint
items.description: A typical residential solar system offsets several tonnes of CO2 emissions each year.

items.title: Power cut protection
items.description: With battery storage, you have reliable backup power during load shedding and grid outages.

items.title: Increase property value
items.description: Homes with solar systems consistently command higher prices in the property market.

items.title: Government subsidies
items.description: Take advantage of MNRE subsidies and state-level incentives to significantly reduce your upfront costs.

feedIn.title: Net metering
feedIn.subtitle: When your solar panels generate more electricity than your home uses, the excess is exported to the grid. You receive a credit for every unit exported under your state's net metering policy.
feedIn.rateNote: Rates vary by state and DISCOM

items.name: Raj P.
items.quote: Our electricity bills have dropped by nearly 50% since the panels went in. The battery means we have power even during load shedding.

items.name: Sunita G.
items.quote: The installation team was fantastic. Everything was done in a day and the monitoring app is really intuitive.

items.name: Vikram N.
items.quote: With the MNRE subsidy, the system paid for itself in under four years. We're now generating more than we use most months.

items.title: Lower running costs
items.description: Electricity is significantly cheaper than petrol or diesel, especially when charging off-peak.

items.title: Zero tailpipe emissions
items.description: EVs produce no exhaust emissions, improving air quality and reducing your carbon footprint.

items.title: Less maintenance
items.description: Fewer moving parts means no oil changes, fewer brake replacements, and lower servicing costs.

items.title: Charge while you sleep
items.description: Plug in at home overnight and wake up to a full battery every morning.

items.title: FAME II & state incentives
items.description: Take advantage of FAME II subsidies, state EV policies, and reduced registration charges for electric vehicles.

items.title: Solar powered driving
items.description: Pair your EV with rooftop solar to charge with clean, free energy from your own roof.

comparison.note: Based on 15,000 km/year. Actual costs depend on vehicle, electricity rates, and driving habits.

items.name: Anil K.
items.quote: Charging overnight costs me a fraction of what I used to spend on petrol. The home charger installation was quick and easy.

items.name: Deepa S.
items.quote: We paired our EV with our solar panels and now most of our driving is essentially free. The app makes scheduling really simple.

items.name: Rohit M.
items.quote: With the FAME II subsidy and state incentives, the EV was surprisingly affordable. Running costs are a fraction of my old car.
